flowSpec.goal: produce a bounded CRM core slice through a sequential prompt-language run optimized for factory-quality evidence rather than raw throughput

nodes.text: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input and do not edit it.

position.text: prompt: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input and do not edit it.

nodes.text: Write docs/prd.md, docs/acceptance-criteria.md, docs/personas.md, docs/use-cases.md, and docs/non-functional-requirements.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small, deterministic, and implementation-ready.

position.text: prompt: Write docs/prd.md, docs/acceptance-criteria.md, docs/personas.md, docs/use-cases.md, and docs/non-functional-requirements.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small, deterministic, and implementation-ready.

nodes.text: Write docs/architecture/context.md, docs/architecture/container.md, docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/architecture/sequence-contact-to-opportunity.md, docs/api-contracts.md, docs/data-model.md, docs/adr-001-stack.md, specs/domain-glossary.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.

position.text: prompt: Write docs/architecture/context.md, docs/architecture/container.md, docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/architecture/sequence-contact-to-opportunity.md, docs/api-contracts.md, docs/data-model.md, docs/adr-001-stack.md, specs/domain-glossary.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.

nodes.text: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.

position.text: prompt: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.

nodes.text: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.

position.text: prompt: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.

nodes.text: Write qa-flows/crm-smoke.json and demo/crm.demo.yaml as deterministic QA and demo specifications for the implemented CRM core. Ground them in the actual workspace state.

position.text: prompt: Write qa-flows/crm-smoke.json and demo/crm.demo.yaml as deterministic QA and demo specifications for the implemented CRM core. Ground them in the actual workspace state.

nodes.text: Write README.md, docs/traceability.md, docs/test-strategy.md, docs/verification-summary.md, docs/product-summary.md, docs/demo-script.md, docs/release-notes.md, docs/known-issues.md, docs/handover.md, and CHANGELOG.md from the implemented workspace. Then run the local verification commands and fix the workspace until build-if-present, noslop doctor, noslop check --tier=fast, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, and npm run test all pass.

position.text: prompt: Write README.md, docs/traceability.md, docs/test-strategy.md, docs/verification-summary.md, docs/product-summary.md, docs/demo-script.md, docs/release-notes.md, docs/known-issues.md, docs/handover.md, and CHANGELOG.md from the implemented workspace. Then run the local verification commands and fix the workspace until build-if-present, noslop doctor, noslop check --tier=fast, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, and npm run test all pass.

nodes.command: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!pkg.scripts?.build){console.log('No build script declared; skipping build verification.'); process.exit(0)} const result=spawnSync('npm',['run','build'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"

position.text: run: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!pkg.scripts?.build){console.log('No build script declared; skipping build verification.'); process.exit(0)} const result=spawnSync('npm',['run','build'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
